raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "In 2025, new public safety laws passed by the Legislature will hold thieves accountable and protect shoppers, business owners, and workers.",
    "A new felony charge will be introduced for individuals who repeatedly commit retail theft.",
    "Law enforcement will be allowed to aggregate stolen property across different locations and victims to charge Felony Grand Theft.",
    "A retail crime restraining order will be established for up to two years to address vandalism, assault, and theft.",
    "Sentencing enhancements of up to four-plus years will be imposed for high value property theft or destruction related to 'smash and grab' crimes.",
    "The laws will address the root causes of retail crime by allowing for an extended cap for probation and encouraging diversion and rehabilitation for offenders.",
    "California will disrupt the sale of stolen goods on online marketplaces by requiring that third-party sellers be certified.",
    "The requirement for higher penalties on criminals who create fires in order to engage in retail theft will be imposed by the new laws.",
    "Penalties on professional organized retail theft will be increased, particularly for significant, large-scale resale schemes."
  ]
}
```
